description_long: This is a rustic loaf of bread with a thick, golden-brown crust and a slightly irregular, hand-formed shape. The crust is dusted lightly with flour and features a few cracks and blisters, giving it an artisanal appearance. The interior is visible from one end, showing a soft, airy crumb with uneven holes and some embedded inclusions, possibly seeds or grains. The loaf has a rolled or folded structure, with a visible seam and some darker spots where the crust has caramelized. The surface texture is rough and matte, with a natural, unprocessed look. This bread would be commonly found in bakeries, markets, or as part of a street food vendor's offerings in an urban setting.
description: A rustic, hand-formed loaf of bread with a thick, golden-brown crust and a soft, airy interior. The surface is rough, flour-dusted, and features natural cracks and blisters.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded, flour-dusted crust with visible cracks and a slightly domed top.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the rolled or folded seam and the irregular, rustic shape of the loaf.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying a flatter crust surface with fewer cracks and a more uniform color.
description_view_3: Cross-sectional view revealing the soft, airy crumb with uneven holes and some embedded inclusions.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick and rustic, with a flour-dusted surface, natural cracks, and a few blisters. There are no visible seeds or decorative scoring, giving it a traditional, hand-formed appearance.
